title: Deliciously Roasted Slovakian Squid Gratin
description: A tender and energizing Slovakian dish featuring roasted squid, this gratin is perfect for a dinner meal, and is ovo-vegetarian-friendly. It combines the flavors of squid, bhuna, and vegetables in a rich and satisfying way.

ingredients.name: squid tubes
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into 1 inch pieces

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the mushrooms to the skillet and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Add the squid to the skillet and cook until it is opaque and tender.
In a small bowl, mix together the bhuna sauce and vegetable broth.
Add the bhuna sauce mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to individual mini cocottes.
Top each cocotte with grated cheese and bread crumbs.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
